summary: Iteration 13: Tested both P0 features end-to-end. (P0#1) Master plan modal with preset application (starter/pro/enterprise) and PATCH /api/companies/{id}/plan; (P0#1) executive limit enforcement via POST /api/users/invite-executive (403 when exceeded, 201 when within capacity); (P0#2) Per-company SMTP UI on Settings + POST /api/companies/me/test-smtp with password and host validation; PATCH /api/companies/me/integrations persistence of email_provider/smtp_*. All 14 backend pytest tests pass. All 3 frontend UI flows pass with the expected data-testid coverage. Aventúrate restored to PRO (exec_limit=15) and email_provider back to 'resend' as required.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/integrations.py: PATCH /companies/me/integrations does not allow clearing smtp_port back to default after setting (truthy check skips 0); minor and edge-case only.

PATCH /companies/me/integrations accepts email_provider via Pydantic Literal but only persists when value is truthy; switching from 'smtp' back to '' won't reset, however UI only exposes 'resend'/'smtp' so not a real risk.
test-smtp endpoint will fall back to stored password when an empty password is sent — make sure the UI never sends the masked bullet placeholder as the password (it correctly does not).
server.py PLAN_DEFAULTS hard-codes per-plan values; consider extracting to a config doc for future plan tiers.
seed_data_creation: Created one test executive 'TEST_cap_ok@aventurate.mx' and suspended it; restored Aventúrate plan to PRO (exec_limit=15) and email_provider to 'resend' to keep demos working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 covers P0 plans + SMTP. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration13_plans_smtp.py are idempotent (cleanup suspends invited test exec, restores PRO plan and resend provider on teardown class TestZRestore). When asserting test-smtp 400 errors, both 'Falta la contraseña SMTP' and 'No se pudo enviar' are valid because the seed company may have a stored SMTP password — the test accepts either. The frontend Settings page hides smtp-section unless email-provider-select='smtp', so toggle the select first via page.select_option.
